audit_traces.check: HEAD equals packet head and tracked product worktree is unchanged
audit_traces.threshold: HEAD 7bf966e66b914cfe877ff5ee8d1990ca3bf3d162 and no tracked product changes
audit_traces.value: HEAD 7bf966e66b914cfe877ff5ee8d1990ca3bf3d162; tracked product diff 0; cached product diff 0
audit_traces.replay: git rev-parse HEAD && git status --short --untracked-files=all && git diff --quiet -- . ':(exclude).okra'

audit_traces.check: Checkpoint evidence age is within max_age
audit_traces.replay: Read observed_at and max_age with jq and compare against date -u

audit_traces.check: Manifest contains exactly 39 Lite and 8 Lite React rows
audit_traces.replay: jq row-count and metric audit of benchmarks/lite-perf/rows.json

audit_traces.check: Deterministic harness passes all declared tests without collecting benchmark samples
evidence: The command ran harness tests only; no benchmark capture command ran

audit_traces.check: Manifest has no scope.run, session.run, owned-resource, retained-memory rows, or retained or allocation observation fields
audit_traces.threshold: 0 matching IDs and 0 matching observation fields
audit_traces.value: 0 matching owned, session, or retained IDs; 0 allocation or retained observation fields
audit_traces.replay: jq ID, metric, and recursive field-name audit of benchmarks/lite-perf/rows.json
evidence: Only metrics present: hz and p75
No scope.run, session.run, sdk-session, sdk-agent, boundary-resource, current-resource, retained, heapUsed, external, arrayBuffers, sampler, or snapshot fields were found
The row measures throughput, not allocated bytes; the supported claim is that no allocation measurement row or observation field exists

audit_traces.check: Current dist artifacts are ignored and cannot prove an exact-head clean build
audit_traces.value: Both dist trees ignored; artifact mtimes precede HEAD commit; no tracked build-provenance record
audit_traces.replay: git check-ignore, stat, git show commit timestamp, and sha256sum for Lite and Lite React dist artifacts

audit_traces.check: Six candidate findings point to source containing the stated operations
audit_traces.replay: Numbered source extraction for every cited range
evidence: scope.ts:2631 constructs Set from spread tag arrays
scope.ts:2253-2260 initializes three Maps, three Sets, and one AbortController
scope.ts:254-267 and 2287-2290 construct the combined abort controller and listeners
scope.ts:2453-2469 constructs the resource context and ten bound owner methods
session.ts:914-923,1017-1058,1128-1163,1526-1530 contain record copies, array scans, appends, and maps
session.ts:680-845 constructs frozen registries with capturing closures

audit_traces.check: Ranks 1 through 6 and assigned semantic risks are evidence-backed
audit_traces.value: No saved ranking or risk checker exists
evidence: Source locations are verified, but no samples, allocation profiles, frequency data, or deterministic semantic-risk checker establish the order or risk labels

audit_traces.check: Proposed allocation calibration and retained-memory design are validated

evidence: The manifest contains only hz and p75 metrics
The checkpoint reports allocation and retained memory as invalid
Missing checker: calibration controls plus allocation and retained-memory schema and comparator tests
